title: Phase 4: Create internal/query
description: Move Query, QueryCursor, QueryMatch, QueryCapture, PredicateStep, PredicateStepType, QueryError, QueryErrorType, and the full recursive descent query compiler from root query.go and query_cursor.go into internal/query/. The new package imports internal/core, internal/subtree, internal/tree, and language/. Root package replaces with type aliases. Move query_test.go into internal/query/. See docs/package-restructure-design.md Phase 4.
